prompt: Create a production-ready transparent PNG icon sheet for Orbwalker treasure chest rewards. Four fantasy treasure chest icons in a 2x2 layout: elemental treasure chest, fire treasure chest, and one alternate for each. Polished stylized 2D match-3 roguelike icon art, strong silhouette at mobile scale, transparent background, no backdrop, no checkerboard, no shadow plate, no text, no labels, no watermark, no casino imagery.
negative_constraints: no watermark, no copyrighted characters, no casino imagery, no gore, no unapproved text, no baked checkerboard, no opaque background
